DEPT 7/JUDGE MASON/REPORTER:M.NORMAN/CLERK:G.SHULL. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. ATNY CHARLES RAMSEY PRESENT FOR PLTF WITH NICOLA HILL, MGR. DEFT SHIRLEY WILLIAMS PRESENT IN PRO-PER. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF TO PREPARE DOCUMENTS.
DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT'S NON-COMPLIANCE WITH TERMS OF SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT/REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF JACKIE ROBINSON APARTMENTS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, SHIRLEY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 25 CASHMERE STREET #2A, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,440.00 RENT, $550.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,990.00, LEASE FORFEITED, JUDGMENT ENTERED UPON PLTF'S DECLARATION OF DEFT'S NON- COMPLIANCE WITH TERMS OF SETTLEMENT STIPULATION. ATNY FEES AMOUNT OF $550 INCLUDES COURT COSTS. IN TERMS OF ORIG SETTLMNT, DFT WAS TO PAY $360 BY 6/5/97; $100/WEEK FOR 11 WEEKS & $30 FOR 1 WEEK;& TO PAY TIMELY RENT
